description: A genuine state transition observed before the post-boot stabilization window elapses is held pending, not dropped and not dispatched early; it dispatches once the window elapses.

events.note: genuine transition, observed before the 5000ms stabilization window elapses

results.reason: stabilization window has not yet elapsed
window elapsed; the already-matched transition from event 2 is released, not re-evaluated against a later observation
